# connectracer_connect_ai_prompt (Resource)

Manages an Amazon Q in Connect AI Prompt resource.

AI Prompts allow you to configure custom prompts for Amazon Q in Connect, controlling how the AI generates responses for different use cases such as answer generation, intent labeling, query reformulation, and self-service pre-processing.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_format` (String) The API format of the AI Prompt. Valid values: `MESSAGES`, `TEXT_COMPLETIONS`. The legacy values `ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_MESSAGES` and `ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_TEXT_COMPLETIONS` are deprecated
- `assistant_id` (String) The identifier of the Amazon Q in Connect assistant
- `model_id` (String) The identifier of the model used for this AI Prompt (e.g. `anthropic.claude-3-haiku--v1:0`, `us.anthropic.claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0`)
- `name` (String) The name of the AI Prompt
- `template_text` (String) The text content of the prompt template (supports YAML prompt format)
- `template_type` (String) The type of the prompt template. Valid values: `TEXT`
- `type` (String) The type of the AI Prompt. Valid values: `ANSWER_GENERATION`, `INTENT_LABELING_GENERATION`, `QUERY_REFORMULATION`, `SELF_SERVICE_PRE_PROCESSING`, `SELF_SERVICE_ANSWER_GENERATION`
- `visibility_status` (String) The visibility status of the AI Prompt. Valid values: `SAVED`, `PUBLISHED`

### Optional

- `create_version` (Boolean) Whether to create a version of the AI Prompt after creation/update. Defaults to `false`
- `description` (String) The description of the AI Prompt
- `max_tokens_to_sample` (Number) The maximum number of tokens to generate in the response (inference configuration)
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to apply to the AI Prompt
- `temperature` (Number) The temperature setting for controlling randomness in the generated response (inference configuration)
- `top_k` (Number) The top-K sampling parameter for token selection (inference configuration)
- `top_p` (Number) The top-P sampling parameter for nucleus sampling (inference configuration)

### Read-Only

- `ai_prompt_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AI Prompt
- `assistant_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Q in Connect assistant
- `id` (String) The identifier of the AI Prompt
- `modified_time` (String) The time the AI Prompt was last modified (RFC3339 format)
- `status` (String) The status of the AI Prompt
- `version_number` (Number) The version number of the AI Prompt (populated when `create_version` is true)
